workflow.name: InfluxDB HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate InfluxDB HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare InfluxDB inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/influxdb-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[influxdb]
10.31.91.11 role=influxdb name=influxdb-01
10.31.91.12 role=influxdb name=influxdb-02
10.31.91.13 role=influxdb name=influxdb-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install InfluxDB container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/influxdb-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: influxdb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/influxdb-inventory.ini /tmp/influxdb-runtime.yml

data.label: Render InfluxDB cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/influxdb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: influxdb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/influxdb
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/influxdb/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            influxdb:
              image: influxdb:2
              container_name: octastack-influxdb
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                DOCKER_INFLUXDB_INIT_MODE: "setup"
                DOCKER_INFLUXDB_INIT_USERNAME: "admin"
                DOCKER_INFLUXDB_INIT_PASSWORD: "change-me-123"
                DOCKER_INFLUXDB_INIT_ORG: "octastack"
                DOCKER_INFLUXDB_INIT_BUCKET: "metrics"
              ports:
                - "8086:8086"
              volumes:
                - data:/var/lib/influxdb2
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy InfluxDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/influxdb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/influxdb/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/influxdb/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/influxdb/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/influxdb-inventory.ini /tmp/influxdb-deploy.yml

data.label: Document InfluxDB topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/influxdb-topology.md <<'EOF'
# InfluxDB HA topology

Members:
- influxdb-01: 10.31.91.11 (influxdb)
- influxdb-02: 10.31.91.12 (influxdb)
- influxdb-03: 10.31.91.13 (influxdb)

This example deploys one InfluxDB container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/influxdb-topology.md

data.label: Validate InfluxDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/influxdb-inventory.ini influxdb -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
